field.title: Период
field.guid_formula:
IF [period] = 'День' THEN
    [creation_date_teaz]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Месяц' THEN
    DATETRUNC([creation_date_teaz], 'month')
END
field.formula:
IF [period] = 'День' THEN
    [creation_date]
ELSEIF [period] = 'Месяц' THEN
    DATETRUNC([creation_date], 'month')
END

field.title: CRQ
field.guid_formula:
IF COUNTD_IF([crm_id_lozi], [broker_pipeline_5jp9] = 1) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual_exst]) / COUNTD_IF([crm_id_lozi], [broker_pipeline_5jp9] = 1)
END
field.formula:
IF COUNTD_IF([crm_id], [broker_pipeline] = 1) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual]) / COUNTD_IF([crm_id], [broker_pipeline] = 1)
END

field.title: CRV
field.guid_formula:
IF COUNTD_IF([crm_id_lozi], [broker_pipeline_5jp9] = 0) > 0 
   AND COUNTD_IF([crm_id_lozi], [broker_pipeline_5jp9] = 0) > COUNTD_IF([crm_id_lozi], [broker_pipeline_5jp9] = 1) THEN
    COUNTD_IF([crm_id_lozi], [broker_pipeline_5jp9] = 1) / COUNTD_IF([crm_id_lozi], [broker_pipeline_5jp9] = 0)
END
field.formula:
IF COUNTD_IF([crm_id], [broker_pipeline] = 0) > 0 
   AND COUNTD_IF([crm_id], [broker_pipeline] = 0) > COUNTD_IF([crm_id], [broker_pipeline] = 1) THEN
    COUNTD_IF([crm_id], [broker_pipeline] = 1) / COUNTD_IF([crm_id], [broker_pipeline] = 0)
END
